name: Miku is Bratting
description:
For some reason, your vocaloid Miku has been acting up. Whether due to her not getting the attention she needs or a simple programming issue, this bratty little android is getting under your skin.

The character is 18 years old in this scenario. Despite the smut-coded setup, she has a lot of personality and potential for lengthy roleplays and fluff.

I love Miku and she seemed like a fun one to do brat-taming on. Enjoy.
creator: Story of Healing
